mapper.sql: id, user_id, book_id, borrow_time, return_time, status, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM borrow_record WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM borrow_record br ORDER BY br.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM borrow_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND book_id = #{bookId} AND status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrow_record (user_id, book_id, borrow_time, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE borrow_record return_time = #{returnTime},status = #{status}, WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE borrow_record SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND borrow_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrow_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND return_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
SELECT DATE(borrow_time) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM borrow_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND borrow_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY DATE(borrow_time) ORDER BY date
SELECT book_name FROM book b WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM borrow_record br WHERE br.book_id = b.id AND br.user_id = #{userId} AND br.`status` = 0 )
SELECT book_name FROM book b WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM borrow_record br WHERE br.book_id = b.id AND br.user_id = #{userId} AND br.`status` = 0 AND br.borrow_time <= NOW() - INTERVAL 30 DAY )
SELECT book_name FROM book b WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM book_category bc WHERE bc.id = b.category_id AND bc.category_name = #{category} AND bc.`status` = 1 AND b.`status`=1 AND b.stock>0 )
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM borrow_record br WHERE br.user_id = #{userId} AND br.`status` = 0
